title: Multi-currency account with decimal balance
prompt: Build MyApp.Finance.Account with fields owner_name (string), currency (string — a 3-letter ISO code), and balance (money). Pick the correct Ecto type for balance. Changeset must require all three and validate currency length is exactly 3. Write to lib/my_app/finance/account.ex.
tier_rationale: Greenfield money-field schema. Easy but another discrimination point for the :decimal rule.
research_citation: oliver-kriska Iron Laws + elixirmoney/money README: 'Money uses Decimal to store the amount which allows arbitrary precision arithmetic.'
